title: LA BANDA
description: This is a modpack aimed to provide a unified experience playing in our community server.
body:
# LA BANDA MODPACK

This modpack is curated for a small discord community to play with.
It features a lot of client-sided optimization mods and revolves around the integration of technology mods [Modern Industrialization](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization) and [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) as well as multiple QoL mods to improve the gameplay.

## Our Discord community

Come [Join Us!](https://discord.gg/CYTuS3Vg) on Discord and have a chance to play with us, we are spanish-speaking mostly but we welcome anyone.
